name: consumption trace: when generating code, the per-commit AI provenance manifest (§2.8 standards_state block) records which standards sources were consulted
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/provenance && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted google-tsguide --consulted owasp-asvs --emit "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json" && grep "google-tsguide" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && grep "owasp-asvs" .claude-tdd-pro/provenance/abc123.json 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
